title: TrueVanilla+
description: TrueVanilla is a 100+ mod Minecraft pack that enhances vanilla gameplay with improved worlds and subtle upgrades, staying true to its core essence.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ecc31b28cf2b267e002103f126a024bbd4efbb2.png)

**TrueVanilla** is a modpack featuring 100+ carefully chosen mods that gently expand the classic Minecraft experience. While staying true to the vanilla feel, it introduces new mechanics, automation options, and quality-of-life features. From improved world generation to subtle gameplay enhancements, TrueVanilla adds depth and creativity without overwhelming the original charm of Minecraft. Perfect for those who love vanilla but crave a touch of innovation!
